--[[ v1.0.0  ]] return(function(...)local m={"\121\119\071\081\117\119\066\086","\121\089\049\084";"\068\120\069\057\101\077\061\061";"\111\106\078\110\068\106\078\056\121\076\075\116\113\077\061\061";"\090\118\055\111\049\077\061\061","\043\076\075\112\079\116\121\104\117\119\078\087\050\120\113\087\121\107\061\061","\067\115\066\100\117\052\061\061","\068\080\048\051\069\069\049\051\116\078\054\069\108\110\075\084\075\090\086\072\049\081\061\061";"\121\120\109\082\121\103\104\098\043\076\050\061";"\049\090\116\114","\077\049\104\075\117\102\111\075";"\043\099\084\061","\048\108\082\068";"\113\049\066\072\117\052\061\061";"\117\054\073\105\073\121\100\110\102\057\050\097\109\112\085\111\054\117\105\103\055\052\061\061";"\043\081\050\120\054\120\070\049\067\052\061\061","\119\069\120\057\052\079\053\047\075\073\097\061","\089\049\077\049";"\079\097\122\051\050\082\111\100\043\112\121\070\121\106\111\072\066\112\048\061";"\113\048\069\078\066\078\078\066\083\048\121\078\111\116\053\097\111\077\061\061";"\105\077\114\098\102\077\085\101\108\102\107\061";"\050\076\078\122\043\049\113\075";"\103\051\048\047\073\122\074\098\055\102\114\107\074\100\119\081\090\085\086\083\072\081\061\061","\120\085\086\117\047\083\052\109","\102\056\056\108\104\054\113\052\107\065\052\068\085\071\081\061";"\112\084\076\073\051\078\101\083\079\119\047\114\043\081\061\061","\111\067\049\118\071\081\061\061","\078\103\121\075\113\119\071\104\043\076\113\118";"\113\083\113\103\100\081\067\122","\053\079\119\082";"\114\089\053\047\055\077\061\061","\111\119\071\072\043\077\061\061","\111\077\072\114\099\043\080\061","\050\049\111\056\070\119\071\100","\089\100\113\070\043\048\110\072\083\120\104\116\066\103\078\089","\110\119\054\102\105\101\069\047\104\120\110\061";"\105\043\107\120\088\075\119\057";"\104\043\050\049\113\107\061\061","\083\052\061\061","\043\053\113\076\070\110\069\086\078\110\068\065\066\049\078\057\111\110\117\061","\113\106\072\057\121\120\066\074";"\117\043\066\050","\102\072\109\098\043\076\111\075\101\107\061\0 z(t)end,function()D=D+(595708+-595707)x[D]=162364-162363 return D end,function(m,u)local z=d(u)local v=function()return a(m,{},u,z)end return v end,function(m)local u,a=-919891-(-919892),m[-989875-(-989876)]while a do x[a],u=x[a]-(-320013-(-320014)),(712512+-712511)+u if 10801+-10801==x[a]then x[a],k[a]=nil,nil end a=m[u]end end return(w(425337+14931642,{}))(z(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[u(-889703+834409)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
